description: Visual atlas of cellular automata behaviors — aesthetic profiles, texture descriptions, and art generation guidance for each major CA family.

families.name: Elementary Cellular Automata (1D)
families.generation: 1D grid rendered as 2D spacetime (rows = generations, columns = cells)

class_1_uniform.visual: Solid fill or empty. All cells converge to the same state.
class_1_uniform.art_use: Texture fill, background base layer, solid masks

class_2_periodic.visual: Repeating diagonal stripes, checkerboards, regular waves
class_2_periodic.art_use: Tiling patterns, scanline aesthetics, fabric textures, rhythmic overlays

class_3_chaotic.visual: Irregular triangular wedges, noise-like fields, asymmetric snowflakes
class_3_chaotic.art_use: Procedural noise, glitch textures, flame effects, organic irregularity

class_4_complex.visual: Particles traveling over structured background, local structures interacting
class_4_complex.art_use: Circuit-board aesthetics, signal propagation, information-flow metaphors

special_rules.name: The Chaotic One
special_rules.texture: Triangular patches of noise, diagonal flame streaks. No periodicity.
special_rules.palette_hint: Hot orange/red wedges on dark ground. Ember textures.

special_rules.name: The Sierpiński Rule
special_rules.texture: Perfect Sierpiński triangle lattice from single-cell seed. XOR-based fractal.
special_rules.palette_hint: High-contrast: white triangles on black, or inverted. Geometric.

special_rules.name: Universal Computation
special_rules.texture: Textured background of repeating small motifs with traveling glider-like structures weaving through it.
special_rules.palette_hint: Muted base with bright particle trails. Circuit-board colors.

special_rules.name: Traffic Flow
special_rules.texture: Diagonal bands drifting left, with stationary jam regions. Like a conveyor belt.

families.name: Life-like Automata (2D)
families.generation: 2D grid, Moore neighborhood, B/S rule notation

rules.name: Conway's Game of Life
rules.texture: Organic pixel swarms. Dense regions form stable structures; sparse regions collapse. Gliders travel across empty space.
rules.visual_character: Sparse, emergent, biological. Fluctuating between collapse and explosion.
rules.palette_hint: Green-on-black (classic), or biological organics (cell culture colors).

rules.name: HighLife
rules.texture: Similar to Life but with self-replicating patterns. Regions clone themselves and expand.
rules.visual_character: Aggressive expansion, self-copying motifs, rapid colonization.
rules.palette_hint: Viral spread aesthetics. Bright birth flash on dark canvas.

rules.name: Seeds
rules.texture: Constant explosive fountain of sparks. Every live cell dies immediately but spawns new ones. Never static.
rules.visual_character: Fireworks, foam, crystalline explosions. Constantly expanding frontier.
rules.palette_hint: Bright hot sparks on void. Birth flash dominant.

rules.name: Maze
rules.texture: Crisp labyrinthine corridors and walls. Grows until frozen into a maze-like static structure.
rules.visual_character: Architectural, labyrinthine, crystalline. Final state is static.
rules.palette_hint: Dungeon map colors. Stone textures. Clean white-on-dark lines.

rules.name: Day & Night
rules.texture: Large organized domains of live/dead cells, with complex boundary structures. Alive and dead are symmetric.
rules.visual_character: High-contrast dueling territories. Self-dual — live/dead flip produces same patterns.
rules.palette_hint: Day/night split palette. Stark contrast. Domain walls as glowing seams.

rules.name: Brian's Brain
rules.texture: Dense field of continuously traveling signals. Nothing is stable. Looks like neural activity or cascade propagation.
rules.visual_character: Endless motion. Bright sharp FIRING cells against dim REFRACTORY trail.
rules.palette_hint: Neon green/blue FIRING on ember-red REFRACTORY on void-black OFF. Neural fire colors.

rules.name: Cyclic CA (Greenberg-Hastings)
rules.texture: Spiral waves expanding from random nucleation sites. Concentric colored rings rotating outward. BZ reaction aesthetics.
rules.visual_character: Serene, hypnotic rotating spirals. Dense with overlapping target patterns.
rules.palette_hint: Full spectral sweep per cycle. Each state is a different hue — creates rainbow spirals.

rules.name: Langton's Ant
rules.texture: Early: symmetric symmetric expanding diamond. Late: produces an infinite 'highway' corridor after ~10,000 steps.
rules.visual_character: Ordered initial chaos resolving into a regular periodic diagonal 'highway' structure.
rules.palette_hint: Path trail coloring. White trail on black, or age-mapped rainbow for visited cells.

rules.name: SmoothLife
rules.description: Continuous extension of Game of Life using a circular neighborhood and smooth transition functions
rules.texture: Flowing, biological blobs. Larger gliders. Pulsating amoeba-like organisms. Merging and splitting cells.
rules.visual_character: Organic, fluid, biological. More creature-like than discrete Life.
rules.palette_hint: Cell-culture greens, fluorescent microscopy aesthetics, or alien bioluminescence.

rules.name: Lenia
rules.description: Full continuous generalization: real-valued states, circular kernel, bell-curve growth function
rules.texture: Multiple named 'species' each with distinct morphology. Orbium glides smoothly. Hydrogeminium pulses. Dendritia branches.
rules.visual_character: Most organic of all CA. True creature-like entities with defined morphologies.

lenia_species.name: Orbium
lenia_species.visual: Smooth gliding disk, like a cell nucleus in motion

lenia_species.name: Hydrogeminium
lenia_species.visual: Pulsating blob, alternating between spread and collapsed

rules.palette_hint: Fluorescent biological imaging. Confocal microscopy look. Or maximize saturation for psychedelic.
